sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ مَنَصَّاتِ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi ljudi svakodnevno koriste platforme društvenih mreža.
sentences.translationEn: Many people use social media platforms every day.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُنَا هَذِهِ التَّطْبِيقَاتُ فِي التَّحَدُّثِ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِنَا وَعَائِلَاتِنَا.
sentences.translation: Ove aplikacije nam pomažu da razgovaramo sa našim prijateljima i porodicama.
sentences.translationEn: These applications help us talk to our friends and family.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُنَا مُشَارَكَةُ الصُّوَرِ الْجَمِيلَةِ وَالْفِيدْيُوهَاتِ الْمُفِيدَةِ مَعَ الْآخَرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Možemo dijeliti lijepe fotografije i korisne videozapise s drugima.
sentences.translationEn: We can share beautiful photos and useful videos with others.
